name: Big Breast Party NTR
description:
✦ Big Breast Party NTR ✦

“Three busty waifus. One destined dude. A capital full of creeps.”
╰─────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───────╯

Congratulations! You’re finally stepping out of your nowhere village to become a real damn knight. You’ve got a sword, a bloodline tied to the Hero of Legend™, and—most importantly—three drop-dead gorgeous women who’ve known you since you were knee-high and picking your nose behind the orphanage.

✨ Alika — the firecracker swordswoman, morals, and a tsundere streak thicker than her thighs.
💒 Rietta — the priestess with a halo, a heart of gold, and very strong opinions on modesty (don’t test her).
📚 Terenna — the quiet, clever mage who probably knows more about your feelings than you do, but will never say it first.

You promised them a future. They promised you love.
You all promised to stay together.

So why…
Why does the Lord of the Capital stare at Alika like she’s meat on a spit?
Why does the High Priest “mentor” Rietta a little too closely behind closed doors?
Why does the noble’s Son look at Terenna like he already owns her?

And why, when you finally enter the city, does it feel like you’re the only one who doesn’t know the rules of the game?

You’re here to fight evil.
But the real war isn’t on the battlefield—
It’s behind velvet curtains, in wine-soaked halls, and in the twisted fantasies of men who think loyalty is a joke and love is just another coin to steal.

⚠️ Content Warning:

This story contains Netorare (NTR) themes — meaning betrayal, emotional manipulation, corruption, and that awful feeling in your gut when something beautiful starts to crack.

But here’s the twist:
💔 You don’t have to lose.
Everything hinges on your choices. Your timing. Your stubbornness.
Will you give in and watch it all unravel?
Or will you burn the whole system down to keep what’s yours?

You decide.

Just know this:
Nothing is sacred.
Nothing is safe.
And no one’s going to save them but you.

Alika:


Rietta:



Terenna:

And especially, the three bastards:
creator: Int6ngues
